entry_criteria.description: UC-58/UC-59/UC-60 and external basis accepted by user.
CR150 is restricted to local metadata linkage, tests and process evidence.

checklist.description: Completion map links factor spec, factor run, factor panel, label window gate, signal set, portfolio policy, backtest run spec, report pack, cost/risk attribution and admission package.
No real lake, NAS, provider, QMT/runtime, simulation/live/trading, broker, credential, Git remote or external framework operation was authorized or counted.
Regression tests cover pass, deterministic chain hash, deferred route boundaries and missing report pack blocking.

exit_criteria.description: Implementation is local metadata-only and covered by automated tests.
CR150 can proceed to CP7 verification without expanding runtime authorization.

commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTEST_ADDOPTS='-p no:cacheprovider' uv run --python 3.11 pytest -q tests/test_cr150_multifactor_framework_completion.py

PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTEST_ADDOPTS='-p no:cacheprovider' uv run --python 3.11 pytest -q tests/test_cr150_multifactor_framework_completion.py tests/research/test_mature_multifactor_framework_stage2.py tests/research/test_mature_multifactor_research_stage3.py
PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/cr150-pycompile uv run --python 3.11 python -m py_compile engine/mature_multifactor_research.py tests/test_cr150_multifactor_framework_completion.py

next_route.action: run CR150 focused verification and finalize process evidence
